title: No test script defined for security-sensitive dependencies (auth, payments)
reasoning: The scripts block contains dev, build, start, lint, and design:* commands but no test script. The project depends on jsonwebtoken for authentication and stripe for payment processing — both are security-sensitive and correctness-critical. Without a test runner wired into the build pipeline (design:check only runs lint + build), there is no automated verification that auth or payment logic works correctly after changes.
recommendation: Add a test script (e.g., "test": "jest" or "test": "vitest") and include it in the design:check pipeline. Prioritize integration-level smoke tests for JWT verification and Stripe API calls.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: There is no test infrastructure to cover it.
suggestedRegressionTest: A minimal smoke test that imports the Stripe client and a JWT helper, verifies they initialize without error, and exercises one happy-path flow for each.
minimumFixScope: Add a test script to package.json scripts and wire it into design:check.
